channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The forgotten organ that could predict how long you live
item.description: A long-overlooked organ may hold surprising clues to healthy aging and cancer survival. Researchers at Mass General Brigham used AI to analyze CT scan...

item.title: Chimpanzees and bonobos have human-like friend circles, study finds
item.description: Great apes appear to build friendships much like humans do. By studying grooming behavior, researchers discovered that chimpanzees and bonobos form cl...

item.title: New solar desalination method yields fresh water without harmful brine
item.description: Researchers have created a solar-powered desalination system that converts seawater to drinking water while avoiding toxic brine waste.

item.title: Tiny microbes inside fish may influence ocean health
item.description: A new study reveals that microbes living in fish could play a key role in shaping ocean chemistry, with significant implications for marine ecosystems.
